enabled.Name: Enable Token Tags
enabled.Hint: Automatically rename duplicate NPC tokens in combat with alphabetical suffixes and apply color-coded effects.

uniqueLetters.Name: Unique Letters Globally
uniqueLetters.Hint: When enabled, assigns unique letters across all types of NPCs in the combat (e.g., Goblin A, Hobgoblin B). When disabled, letters are per-actor type (e.g., Goblin A, Hobgoblin A).

includeSingletons.Name: Letter Unique Creatures
includeSingletons.Hint: When enabled, creatures that are the only one of their type in the combat will also receive a letter (e.g. Boss A). When disabled, only creatures with duplicates of the same type receive letters.

restoreOnCombatEnd.Name: Restore Names on Combat End
restoreOnCombatEnd.Hint: When combat is deleted, restore original token names and remove letter effects.

iconDirectory.Name: Icon Storage Directory
iconDirectory.Hint: Directory in user data where generated letter icons are stored. Changing this requires a reload.

colorConfigMenu.Name: Letter Color Settings
colorConfigMenu.Label: Configure Colors
colorConfigMenu.Hint: Customize the background and text colors used for each letter marker.

debug.Name: Debug Logging
debug.Hint: Enable verbose console logging. Useful for troubleshooting.
